title: Late Onboarding Stress Test
intendedTensionBeat: Dense mixed blockers and multiple rescues require commitment instead of broad cleanup.
intendedReleaseBeat: A correct full commitment to the first rescue creates a readable pivot to the second.
expectedPath: Commit fully to the most urgent rescue, pivot hard to the second, and ignore tempting low-value clears.
expectedFailMode: Player brute-force clears or hesitates and suffers dock or water failure.
designNotes: This is the hardest onboarding exam, but failure must still be attributable.
